interpretation.general_optimizer_claim: requires confirmation on a standard external benchmark
interpretation.reason: This is a compact real-workload discovery suite; its scores are not numerical reproductions of paper tables.
interpretation.valid_local_claim: paired improvement over equally tuned methods on these fingerprinted real workloads

protocol.eligibility_rule: zero invalid workloads on complete validation
protocol.research_claim_gate: paired sealed-test improvement plus external TaskSet/VeLOdrome or AlgoPerf confirmation
